title: hexa-agent — P-HEXA: HexaAgent — AI-UI-AI Loop für die GenesisAeon Architektur
description:
HexaAgent — AI-UI-AI Loop für die GenesisAeon Architektur (Phase 6): a six-role agent orchestration framework (coordinator, transform, philosophy, ui) built around a deterministic, replayable Q4-state event loop.

Part of the GenesisAeon ecosystem (P-HEXA, domain: agent framework (6-role orchestration)).

See github.com/GenesisAeon/HexaAgent for source, documentation, and reproducibility notebooks.
